text_block_list.text:
There is no training today since Gold City has
work. I decide to go relax at the park when...

text_block_list.name: School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
No way, is that her?! Her face is so pretty! She's
literally a divine creation. What does she even
eat every day—mist?

Gold City stands before the excited girls,
surrounded by her staff for a photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: School Girl B
text_block_list.text: Ahh, she looked this way! She's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
We've got quite the audience, City. Think you
can keep going?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's okay, I'm used to it. On the other hand...

Did Gold City just try to catch my eye? No...
surely I'm imagining things.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. I thought I saw someone I know over
there, that's all. They just left though.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll make sure you stay and watch.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hold on. What is my trainer doing?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Oh. It seems you have a very enthusiastic fan!
Impressive commitment.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Some goody-two-shoes who'd support anyone
you put in front of them.
